root.name: Bloody Vexor
血染狂怒
root.description: Drone-oriented fit with enough staying power to clear all
无人机方向配置，可全打完

branch.fit: [Vexor] [low] Type-D Restrained Capacitor Flux Coil Type-D Restrained Capacitor Flux Coil Type-D Restrained Capacitor Flux Coil AE-K Compact Drone Damage Amplifier AE-K Compact Drone Damage Amplifier [med] Large Compact Pb-Acid Cap Battery Enduring Multispectrum Shield Hardener 10MN Monopropellant Enduring Afterburner Large Clarity Ward Enduring Shield Booster [high] Drone Link Augmentor I [rig] Medium Thermal Shield Reinforcer I Medium Thermal Shield Reinforcer I Medium Capacitor Control Circuit I [drone] Wasp I x3 Hornet I x2 Vespa I x4
